title: action-sha-archive-complexity-hardening
outOfScope: Changing release publication behavior before Work Item 17.

riskAssessment.reason: Workflow supply chain, immutable archive ordering, and complexity increments need fail-closed evidence.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the approved implementation loop.

preReviewWarnings: Verify every third-party Action is SHA-pinned and archive evidence remains append-only.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: All third-party workflow Actions are SHA-pinned and static workflow checks pass.
Archive sequence and immutable archive checks reject ordering or historical mutation errors.
Complexity reports include a current change increment and fail when configured limits are exceeded.
Workflow, archive, complexity, and lifecycle documentation are updated.
guidelines: Historical archive evidence remains immutable and append-only.

intent.problem: The remaining stabilization work needs explicit Action pinning, archive ordering guarantees, and incremental complexity evidence.
constraints: Do not rewrite historical archive records.
Do not weaken existing workflow or archive guards.
intent.rationale: These checks protect the integrity of release and lifecycle evidence before publication.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Archive sequence or historical mutation error

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
